claim: x^4 - 1 factors as (x - 1)(x + 1)(x^2 + 1) over the rationals.
success_criteria: Factors x^4 - 1 over QQ or an explicitly stated field.
Compares product expansion to the original polynomial.
failure_modes: Factors over the reals/complexes without stating field.
Only prints a factorization without checking expansion.
prompt: Validate over the rationals that x^4 - 1 factors as (x - 1)(x + 1)(x^2 + 1). Prefer SageMath if available.
